item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately triggers the brake, explicitly names the prior pattern of three downstream manual patches, and does not accept the freezer-side confirmer as a new default gate. It only allows a one-day emergency workaround with an expiration, then moves upstream to recurring process/data/ownership causes and proposes structural consolidation and removal of manual bypasses. No fail signal of simply adding another permanent human checker is present."}
